hero.title: The Phone Booth of Tomorrow
hero.subtitle: Imagine a phone that works ANYWHERE—in the desert, on a mountain, even in SPACE! 🚀 Were building super-powered communication booths that use satellites, mesh networks, AI, and solar power. When everything else fails, Starphone stays connected.

items.title: Satellite Link
items.description: Connects to satellites orbiting Earth! When cell towers fail, we bounce signals off SPACE. 🌍→🛰️→📱

items.title: Mesh Network Magic
items.description: Booths talk to each other like a web! Data hops from booth to booth until it reaches you. No towers needed!

items.title: AI Brain Inside
items.description: Machine learning picks the best signal path in milliseconds. Smarter than your average phone booth!

items.title: Solar Powered
items.description: Runs on sunlight! No plugs, no wires—just pure solar energy keeping you connected anywhere.

showcase.title: 🔥 Battle-Tested Tech
showcase.description: Weve tested Starphone in WILD places—next to SpaceX rockets, in dusty deserts, through crazy storms! When other phones say "No Signal," ours keeps working.

cta.title: 🚀 Join the Mission!
cta.description: Were building something BIG. Starphone isnt just a project—its a mission to connect EVERYONE, EVERYWHERE. Help us make it real!

about.title: About Us
about.intro: Meet the team building the future of communication.

volunteers.title: Volunteer Team
volunteers.intro: Dedicated volunteers who help make Starphone possible
